  "ship_order": ["pattern_1", "pattern_2", "pattern_3"],

    "pattern_1_explain": "add `explain` param to existing `recall` tool",
    "pattern_1_approach": "param_flag",
    "pattern_2_quality_gate": "assess_block_quality",
    "pattern_2_default_mode": "advisory",
    "pattern_3_deps_table": "new_table",
    "pattern_3_tool_a": "trace_block_lineage",
    "pattern_3_tool_b": "cascade_confidence_decay"
  },
  "schema_risks": [
    "P3 cyclic dependencies causing infinite loops in staleness propagation",
    "P2 Levenshtein calculation overhead degrading ingestion latency",
    "P1 _explain field increasing payload size for SQLite recall.db cache"
  ],
  "tests_needed": [
    "P3 transitive decay logic verification (1-hop vs 3-hop)",
    "P2 near-duplicate boundary testing (0.94 vs 0.95 threshold)",
    "P1 score decomposition math consistency check"
  ],
  "score_0_to_10": 8.5,
  "biggest_concern": "Introducing new tool names for P3 risks destabilizing the 4B model's existing tool_call coverage if not strictly managed.",
  "retrain_recommendation": "v3.11.1_followup",
  "retrain_rationale": "P1 and P2 can be implemented via params and internal hooks to avoid new tool names, allowing backend stabilization before exposing P3 tools to the 4B model."
}
